Artisanal Wallpaper — Founded by Painters

Walls that
breathe
and hold
energy

Hand-painted wallpapers crafted by artists. Each surface becomes a ritual space — a confluence of light, pigment, and intentional presence.

New Arrival

Featured · Solara Collection

Golden Light
Pattern No. 1

Solara — Fire · Light · Energy

Our inaugural pattern channels the Mediterranean sun through hand-applied pigments on FSC-certified substrate. Each panel is a unique painting — no two walls will be identical. Designed for south-facing rooms, hotel lobbies, and spaces intended for vitality and warmth.

TechniqueHand-painted, pigment on substrate
MaterialsFSC paper, water-based pigments
DimensionsCustom — made to measure
Lead time4–6 weeks
Feng ShuiFire element — south walls

€480 /m²

Minimum order: 5m² · Sample available

The Ritual of Making

Art takes
time

Each wall begins as a conversation. It moves through consultation, hand-painting, and careful installation — a 4 to 6 week ritual of craft.

Discover the Process
01Consultation
↓
02Design & Sample
↓
03Hand-Painting
↓
04Installation

Voices from the Field

"The Solara panels transformed our entrance hall into something sacred. Guests stop and breathe differently when they enter."

Interior Designer — Ibiza Boutique Hotel

"Working with Anavai felt like commissioning a painting for every wall. The energy in the space is tangible."

Private Client — Villa, Mallorca

"Our spa guests consistently comment on the walls. The Undara collection set the tone for the entire treatment journey."

Spa Director — Wellness Retreat, Tuscany

Circular Luxury Craft

Beauty with
responsibility

Production on demand means zero stock and zero waste. Every offcut becomes a small artwork or packaging material. Local artisans. Short supply chains. Water-based pigments.

0 Unsold stock
100% FSC-certified materials
Local Artisan production
Anavai

Artisanal wallpaper for spaces that hold meaning. Founded by two painters committed to sustainable luxury craft.
